scores.notes: Severe OCR errors throughout. Company name heavily corrupted ('SaA, MTIR | SULAL FHBIT' vs 'S.H.H. MOTOR (SUNGAI RENGIT) SDN. BHD.'). Address partially recognizable but with many character errors. Date incorrect (21-01-2019 vs 23-01-2019). Total amount correct (20.00) but surrounded by garbled text. Most text is illegible with random characters and fragments.
